Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-28 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data reveals two exceptional performers at the top of the long-term momentum rankings. CLMT ranks #1 with a score of 93.0, posting extraordinary 10-year returns of 883.38% while maintaining clean momentum signals and passing all four ratio threshold tests. EACO follows closely with even more extreme long-term performance—a staggering 1758.23% over 10 years—though the data appears incomplete. Both stocks trade above all major moving averages (SMA 30/50/100/200) and significantly outpace SPY across multiple timeframes; CLMT beats SPY by 115.16% over 1 year and 615.1% over 10 years, while EACO's 10-year SPY relative performance reaches 1489.95%. The correlation data shows both tickers have negative relationships with tech indices (QQQ at -0.166 for CLMT) but positive exposure to energy and commodity sectors, suggesting these are non-traditional growth drivers distinct from traditional tech-driven market momentum.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
